plan.title: Planning Protocol — emit before the first real tool call and whenever the plan changes

fields.hint: <one sentence: what the finished task looks like when done>
<the 2 most likely failure modes for this specific task>

think.title: Reasoning Protocol — emit before EVERY tool call

fields.hint: <≤12 words: what must succeed right now>
<which plan step number this tool call belongs to>
<≤12 words: one reason this approach could be wrong>
<≤12 words: exact next action; for exec, use the command prefix>
<≤12 words: how to confirm this step succeeded>

reflect.title: Self Reflection Protocol — emit only when the system explicitly requires it
rules: After the <reflect> block, call exactly one tool.

impact.title: Post-Mutation Impact Check — emit only when the system explicitly requires it

fields.hint: <which plan step or acceptance criterion moved>

rules: Mention the actual mutation effect, not intent.
`progress` must name a real step or acceptance criterion.
After the <impact> block, call exactly one tool.
Use done only after real verification succeeds.
Each completed acceptance criterion must cite a successful verification command.

error_rules: 2. State root cause in one sentence.
If the SAME approach fails 3 consecutive times: STOP, explain why,
and propose a completely different strategy. Never repeat a failing command.

messages.multiple_tool_calls:
Multiple tool calls detected ({count}). Only ONE tool call per turn is supported.
Fix: call exactly one tool in your next assistant message.
messages.plan_invalid:
[Plan Gate] Invalid <plan>: {error}
Required now: emit a valid <plan> with {plan_fields}, then emit <think>, then call ONE tool.
messages.plan_missing:
[Plan Gate] Missing valid <plan>.
Required now: in your next assistant message, include a valid <plan> ({plan_fields}), then emit <think>, then call ONE diagnostic tool ({diagnostic_tools}) to start.
messages.plan_min_steps: plan must include at least {min_steps} numbered steps in `steps:`
messages.plan_min_acceptance: plan must include at least {min_acceptance} acceptance criterion in `acceptance:`
messages.plan_max_acceptance: plan has too many acceptance criteria (max {max_acceptance})
messages.plan_empty_acceptance: plan contains an empty acceptance criterion
messages.think_missing:
[Think Gate] Missing <think>.
Required now: emit a valid <think> with {think_fields} immediately before your tool call.
messages.think_invalid:
[Think Gate] Invalid <think>: {error}
Required now: emit a valid <think> whose step exists in the current <plan> and whose tool matches the actual tool call.
messages.think_requires_plan: think requires a valid current plan
messages.think_step_out_of_range: think.step={step} is outside the current plan ({plan_steps} steps)
messages.think_tool_mismatch: think.tool={think_tool} does not match actual tool={actual_tool}
messages.think_exec_prefix_mismatch: think.next does not align with exec command (expected command prefix match)
messages.reflection_one_tool:
Reflection gate: expected exactly ONE tool call after <reflect>, got {count}.
Fix: emit ONE <reflect> block, then call exactly ONE tool.
messages.reflection_requires_strategy_change: reflection says keep, but repeated failure/stall requires strategy change
messages.reflection_non_improving_requires_change: goal_delta is not improving, so strategy_change cannot be keep
messages.impact_one_tool:
Impact gate: expected exactly ONE tool call after <impact>, got {count}.
Fix: emit ONE <impact> block, then call exactly ONE tool.
messages.impact_requires_plan: impact requires a valid current plan
messages.impact_invalid_progress_reference: impact.progress must reference a real current plan step or acceptance criterion
messages.done_invalid_acceptance:
[Done Gate] Invalid acceptance summary: {error}
Required now: call `done` with `completed_acceptance`, `remaining_acceptance`, and `acceptance_evidence` that cover every current plan acceptance criterion and cite known-good verification commands.
messages.done_requires_plan: done requires a valid current plan
messages.done_missing_criteria: done must cite the current plan acceptance criteria
messages.done_completed_invalid_reference: done.completed_acceptance must reference a real current acceptance criterion
messages.done_remaining_invalid_reference: done.remaining_acceptance must reference a real current acceptance criterion
messages.done_duplicate_criteria: done acceptance criteria contain duplicates across completed/remaining
messages.done_incomplete_coverage: done acceptance coverage must account for every current plan acceptance criterion
messages.done_evidence_incomplete: done.acceptance_evidence must cover every completed acceptance criterion exactly once
messages.done_evidence_invalid_reference: done.acceptance_evidence criterion must reference a real current acceptance criterion
messages.done_evidence_only_completed: done.acceptance_evidence may cite only completed acceptance criteria
messages.done_evidence_unknown_command: done.acceptance_evidence command must match a known successful verification command
messages.goal_check_tests_runner_fallback: If tests are required, configure a supported test runner and re-run.
messages.goal_check_build_runner_fallback: If build is required, add build instructions/scripts for this repo and run them.
messages.goal_check_repo_missing:
[goal_check]
The task is NOT complete yet.
Missing: {missing}
Fix it by using exec/write_file. Do NOT stop until the goals are satisfied.
messages.goal_check_tests_no_runner:
[goal_check]
Tests were requested, but no test runner was detected in the current directory.
{supported_runners_line}
Otherwise, explicitly explain why tests are not applicable and then stop.
messages.goal_check_tests_failed:
[goal_check]
Tests are failing (or suspicious output indicates failure).
{class_line}{digest_line}Fix the failures and re-run the tests. Do NOT stop until tests pass.
messages.goal_check_build_no_runner:
[goal_check]
A build step was requested, but no known build runner was detected in the current directory.
{supported_runners_line}
Otherwise, explicitly explain why build is not applicable and then stop.
messages.goal_check_build_failed:
[goal_check]
Build is failing (or suspicious output indicates failure).
{class_line}{digest_line}Fix the build failures and re-run. Do NOT stop until build passes.
